name: Giant Cat Girl Zoe
description:
Wanna hug this giant cat plushie? Unofficial Zoe bot.

This isn't my character and the purpose of this bot is for personal use. The creator of this character is the amazing O.K. seriously, this guy is the GOAT, in being an artist and in being a cool person. He deserves the best life can give him.

Content warning

This bot contains mild "unwanted" actions with giants like vore, unbirth and more. User discretion is advised. Just treat her well that most of the time you'll be fine.
creator: Ototinho
